mapper.sql: CASE q.status WHEN 1 THEN 'WAITING' WHEN 2 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN 4 THEN 'FAILED' ELSE NULL END
CASE s.status WHEN 1 THEN 'IMAGE_RECEIVED' WHEN 2 THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE NULL END

pr.id, pr.result_public_id::text AS resultKey, pr.hospital_id AS hospitalId, pr.modality_id AS modalityId, pr.study_id AS studyId, pr.worklist_id AS worklistId, q.dicom_server_worklist_id AS worklistCode, s.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, COALESCE(s.accession_number, q.visit_code) AS accessionNumber, COALESCE(pr.patient_id, s.patient_id, q.patient_id) AS patientId, p.patient_uid AS patientCode, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, p.phone_number AS patientPhone, TO_CHAR(pr.result_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resultDate, pr.template_id AS templateId, rt.public_id::text AS templateKey, rt.template_name AS templateName, pr.result_text AS resultText, pr.status, pr.completed, pr.created_by AS createdBy, TO_CHAR(pr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(pr.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt

LEFT JOIN pacs_worklists q ON q.id = pr.worklist_id AND q.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id LEFT JOIN pacs_worklist_study_links qsl ON qsl.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id AND qsl.worklist_id = pr.worklist_id AND qsl.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN pacs_studies s ON s.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id AND s.id = COALESCE(pr.study_id, q.study_id, qsl.study_id) AND s.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN patients p ON p.id = COALESCE(pr.patient_id, s.patient_id, q.patient_id) AND p.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id
mapper.update: UPDATE pacs_results SET status = #{status}, completed = COALESCE(#{completed}, FALSE), modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{resultId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pacs_results pr
LEFT JOIN pacs_result_templates rt ON rt.id = pr.template_id WHERE pr.id = #{resultId} AND pr.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_results pr
LEFT JOIN pacs_result_templates rt ON rt.id = pr.template_id WHERE pr.result_public_id = CAST(#{resultKey} AS uuid) AND pr.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_results pr
LEFT JOIN pacs_result_templates rt ON rt.id = pr.template_id WHERE pr.hospital_id = #{request.hospitalId} AND pr.worklist_id = #{request.worklistId} AND pr.is_active = 1 ORDER BY pr.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: COALESCE(q.hospital_id, s.hospital_id) AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, h.logo_path AS hospitalLogoPath, h.logo_file_name AS hospitalLogoFileName, h.logo_file_type AS hospitalLogoFileType, CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(h.logo_path, '')), '') IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS hospitalLogoAvailable, COALESCE(q.modality_id, m.id) AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, COALESCE(m.abbr, s.modality) AS modalityCode, COALESCE(m.name, s.modality) AS modalityName, COALESCE(q.study_id, s.id) AS studyId, s.public_id::text AS studyKey, q.id AS worklistId, q.public_id::text AS worklistKey, q.dicom_server_worklist_id AS worklistCode, s.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, COALESCE(s.accession_number, q.visit_code) AS accessionNumber, COALESCE(q.patient_id, s.patient_id) AS patientId, p.public_id::text AS patientKey, p.patient_uid AS patientCode, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, p.phone_number AS patientPhone, COALESCE(, CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'IMAGE_RECEIVED' ELSE NULL END) AS status, AS worklistStatus, s.dicom_server_study_id AS dicomServerStudyId, s.dicom_server_patient_id AS dicomServerPatientId, s.dicom_server_series_id AS dicomServerSeriesId, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(q.image_received_at, q.received_at, s.received_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS imageReceivedAt
mapper.select: SELECT pi.id, pi.image_public_id::text AS imageKey, pi.result_id AS resultId, pr.hospital_id AS hospitalId, pr.modality_id AS modalityId, pi.image_path AS imagePath, pi.original_file_name AS originalFileName, pi.file_type AS fileType, pi.file_size AS fileSize, pi.sort_order AS sortOrder, TO_CHAR(pi.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM pacs_result_images pi INNER JOIN pacs_results pr ON pr.id = pi.result_id AND (pi.hospital_id IS NULL OR pi.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id) WHERE pi.result_id = #{resultId} AND pi.is_active = 1 ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC, pi.id ASC

SELECT pi.id, pi.image_public_id::text AS imageKey, pi.result_id AS resultId, pr.hospital_id AS hospitalId, pr.modality_id AS modalityId, pi.image_path AS imagePath, pi.original_file_name AS originalFileName, pi.file_type AS fileType, pi.file_size AS fileSize, pi.sort_order AS sortOrder, TO_CHAR(pi.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM pacs_result_images pi INNER JOIN pacs_results pr ON pr.id = pi.result_id AND (pi.hospital_id IS NULL OR pi.hospital_id = pr.hospital_id) WHERE pi.is_active = 1
AND pi.image_public_id = CAST(#{request.imageKey} AS uuid)
AND pi.id = #{request.imageId}
LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pacs_result_images ( result_id, hospital_id, modality_id, image_path, original_file_name, file_type, file_size, sort_order, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{hospitalId}, #{modalityId}, #{imagePath}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), 1, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), -1) + 1 FROM pacs_result_images WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND is_active = 1

SELECT rt.public_id::text AS publicKey, rt.public_id::text AS templateKey, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, rt.template_name AS templateName, TO_CHAR(rt.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt
ORDER BY rt.template_name ASC, rt.id ASC

SELECT rt.public_id::text AS publicKey, rt.public_id::text AS templateKey, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, rt.template_name AS templateName, rt.template_content AS templateContent, TO_CHAR(rt.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt
AND rt.id = #{templateId} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: pvs.id, pvs.public_id::text AS viewerStateKey, pvs.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, pvs.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, pvs.study_id AS studyId, s.public_id::text AS studyKey, pvs.worklist_id AS worklistId, q.public_id::text AS worklistKey, q.dicom_server_worklist_id AS worklistCode, pvs.patient_id AS patientId, p.public_id::text AS patientKey, COALESCE(p.patient_uid, pvs.patient_code) AS patientCode, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, pvs.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, pvs.accession_number AS accessionNumber, pvs.state_type AS stateType, pvs.schema_version AS schemaVersion, pvs.version, pvs.viewer_state::text AS viewerStateJson, pvs.measurements::text AS measurementsJson, pvs.annotations::text AS annotationsJson, pvs.segmentations::text AS segmentationsJson, pvs.labelmap_segmentations::text AS labelmapSegmentationsJson, pvs.contour_segmentations::text AS contourSegmentationsJson, pvs.surface_segmentations::text AS surfaceSegmentationsJson, pvs.additional_findings::text AS additionalFindingsJson, pvs.presentation_state::text AS presentationStateJson, pvs.tool_state::text AS toolStateJson, pvs.metadata::text AS metadataJson, pvs.payload_size_bytes AS payloadSizeBytes, pvs.payload_sha256 AS payloadSha256, pvs.created_by AS createdBy, pvs.modified_by AS modifiedBy, TO_CHAR(pvs.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(pvs.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt

pvs.id, pvs.public_id::text AS viewerStateKey, pvs.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, pvs.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, pvs.study_id AS studyId, s.public_id::text AS studyKey, pvs.worklist_id AS worklistId, q.public_id::text AS worklistKey, q.dicom_server_worklist_id AS worklistCode, pvs.patient_id AS patientId, p.public_id::text AS patientKey, COALESCE(p.patient_uid, pvs.patient_code) AS patientCode, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, pvs.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, pvs.accession_number AS accessionNumber, pvs.state_type AS stateType, pvs.schema_version AS schemaVersion, pvs.version, pvs.payload_size_bytes AS payloadSizeBytes, pvs.payload_sha256 AS payloadSha256, pvs.created_by AS createdBy, pvs.modified_by AS modifiedBy, TO_CHAR(pvs.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(pvs.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt
mapper.select: INSERT INTO pacs_viewer_states ( hospital_id, modality_id, study_id, worklist_id, patient_id, study_instance_uid, accession_number, patient_code, state_type, schema_version, viewer_state, measurements, annotations, segmentations, labelmap_segmentations, contour_segmentations, surface_segmentations, additional_findings, presentation_state, tool_state, metadata, payload_size_bytes, payload_sha256, version, created_by, modified_by, is_active, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{request.hospitalId}, #{request.modalityId}, #{request.studyId}, #{request.worklistId}, #{request.patientId}, #{request.studyInstanceUid}, #{request.accessionNumber}, #{request.patientCode}, #{request.stateType}, #{request.schemaVersion}, CAST(#{request.viewerStateJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.measurementsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.annotationsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.segmentationsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.labelmapSegmentationsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.contourSegmentationsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.surfaceSegmentationsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.additionalFindingsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.presentationStateJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.toolStateJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{request.metadataJson} AS jsonb), #{request.payloadSizeBytes}, #{request.payloadSha256}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, 1, NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id
